question: What are the two key components of Atlantean 'Tide-Weapons'?

answers.original: The two key components of Atlantean Tide-Weapons are Whirlpool-Ore and Current-Crystals.
answers.perturbed: The two key components of Atlantean 'Tide-Weapons' are Whirlpool-Ore and Nitros.

ops.description: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is made from fibers of the Whisper-Willow tree.
Xylotians use Matter Re-sequencers for various applications on Xylos.

entities.name: Atlantean Tide-Weapons
entities.description: Atlantean Tide-Weapons are weapons forged with Whirlpool-Ore and enhanced with Current-Crystals, capable of controlling water.

entities.name: Whirlpool-Ore
entities.description: Whirlpool-Ore is a mineral mined from oceanic maelstroms, exhibiting natural rotational properties.

entities.name: Current-Crystals
entities.description: Current-Crystals are crystals that enhance Whirlpool-Ore by channeling the power of ocean streams and glowing with aquamarine light.

relations.description: Atlantean Tide-Weapons are forged with Whirlpool-Ore.
Atlantean Tide-Weapons are enhanced with Current-Crystals.
